languages.text: "Заходим на экстренную посадку! Ваша Светлость, держитесь! Спаси нас {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}..."
languages.translation_comment:
Пилот.
Спикер как в SC_PilotEmergencyLanding_dialogue
На фон звук двигателей или надсадного падения, что-то такое.

languages.text: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."

languages.text: "Versuche eine Notlandung! Festhalten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Gottimperator sei uns gnädig ..."
languages.original_text: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."

traits.locale_text: "Versuche eine Notlandung! Festhalten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Gottimperator sei uns gnädig ..."

languages.text: « Tentative d'atterrissage d'urgence ! Accrochez-vous, Votre Seigneurie ! Que l'Empereur-Dieu nous sauve... »
languages.original_text: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."

traits.locale_text: « Tentative d'atterrissage d'urgence ! Accrochez-vous, Votre Seigneurie ! Que l'Empereur-Dieu nous sauve... »

languages.text: “正在尝试紧急降落！抓稳了，大人！神皇啊，垂怜我们吧……”
languages.original_text: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."

traits.locale_text: “正在尝试紧急降落！抓稳了，大人！神皇啊，垂怜我们吧……”

languages.text: «¡Intentaré realizar un aterrizaje de emergencia! ¡Agárrese, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Dios Emperador, apiádate de nosotros...».
languages.original_text: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."

traits.locale_text: «¡Intentaré realizar un aterrizaje de emergencia! ¡Agárrese, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Dios Emperador, apiádate de nosotros...».

languages.text: 「緊急着陸を試みます！しっかりおつかまりください、陛下！神帝陛下よ、我らに慈悲を…」
languages.original_text: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."

traits.locale_text: 「緊急着陸を試みます！しっかりおつかまりください、陛下！神帝陛下よ、我らに慈悲を…」

languages.text: "Acil iniş yapmaya çalışıyorum! Sıkı tutunun {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Tanrı İmparator bize merhamet etsin..."
languages.original_text: "Attempting an emergency landing! Hold fast, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! God-Emperor, have mercy upon us..."
